steps: Use oral saliva swab kit Oral Saliva Swab Salimetrics Catalog #5001.02 & 5001.05 to obtain minimum 1 mL of saliva, maximum 2 mL
Add 1 mL of gold nanoparticles and 1 mL of saliva into 5mL-eppendorf tube. Mix using vortex mixer for 00:00:05 . Gold Nanospheres - Bare (Citrate) 80nm Nanocomposix Catalog # AUCN80
Place tube into sample holder of Raman spectrometer and turn on then press scan.
